name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished slides without the generic, over-designed output typical of AI tools.
problem: Creating professional presentations with AI often results in bland, templated output that requires heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 aims to give teams a smarter authoring experience that keeps human intent and design quality front and center. This saves time without sacrificing the credibility of the final deck.
useCases: Building client-facing pitch decks that look bespoke rather than auto-generated
Creating internal business reviews and strategy presentations quickly
Producing sales enablement materials with consistent brand quality
Drafting investor updates or board presentations with structured narrative flow
